abilities.name: Drunk and Reckless
abilities.description: If Intoxicated, may suffer 2 damage at start of turn to gain additional General AP.

abilities.name: From the Hip
abilities.description: Uses Grace instead of Intellect for Long Arm attacks.

abilities.name: Squeal (Mask)
abilities.description: After damaged by enemy Close Combat, push 4 yards directly away.

actions: (1) Banjo Bash (Melee) | AV: 1 (6) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/2/4 damage. If Critical Effect, breaks and ceases function.

(1) Boomstick (Long Arms) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3B damage. Must declare Trigger. Capacity 1, Reload 1. Ram Dumb Luck: Double damage, suffer half. Crow Whoops Ricochet: Closest char within range suffers 1 damage. Tome What If: Add +B to Moderate/Severe. Mask I Got Him: After succeeding, push 3 yards toward target.
system.notes: Most intelligent creatures of Bayou. Raised through mimicry. Learn from humans: clothing, firearms, walls, pig domestication, moonshine brewing. Population booming. Serious threat to Guild dominance.
